userOutcome: Every layer (supervisor, executor, implementer) writes structured events to a shared append-only log. loop-status and loop-history CLI commands surface real-time state and recent history.
scopeSummary: Create execution-log.jsonl format and log_execution_event() helper. Add loop-status CLI that reads lanes + log + heartbeats. Add loop-history CLI. Define agent heartbeat file format.
risks: Log file grows unbounded without rotation
readinessReason: No dependencies. Straightforward format + CLI commands.
handoffSummary: Create execution_events.py with log_execution_event(). Create .cnogo/execution-log.jsonl format. Add loop-status and loop-history to workflow_memory.py. Define agent-heartbeat-task-N.json format.
